tasks.title: Improve error handling with specific exception types in send_completion_request
tasks.description: Refactor the exception handling block to catch ConnectionError, Timeout, and HTTPError separately from general RequestException. Return distinct error messages for each case while preserving the overall dict return type.

tasks.title: Add logging instead of silent error returns
tasks.description: Import the logging module at the top of the file and configure basic logging. Replace the silent {'error': str(e)} return with logged errors using logger.error(), then still return the error dict for backward compatibility.
